name: Rise of Kenshin
short_description: Demons invasion, the young heroes face the heavy siege of the enemy, they fought in blood and finally recovered the lost land. This is a national style Roguelike casual game, players can play a variety of roles, gradually grow, and experience the hearty grass-cutting battles.
detailed_description:
[National style light meat pigeon - free to break into the jianghu]

No need for complicated operation, just by dexterous positioning and martial arts choices, you can experience the thrill of cutting grass in a flowing stream! Eight skilled warriors, eight volumes of mysterious martial arts, to open up your book of quick revenge.

The eight warriors have their own unique skills, and they can break through the realm by having epiphanies or understanding the secret books during the battle. Freely allocate the attribute points of “Life/Attack/Movement Speed/Blast/Evasion/Dodge/Immunity” to them. -Iron Shield? Ghostly Assassin? It's up to you!

[Martial Arts Triad]

❶ Initial Strengthening: Dramatically increase the power and range of your skills

❷ Awakening of the Mastery: Achieve the Mastery achievement or study the secret book to unlock the ultimate axioms

❸ Lost True Martial Arts: Reach the peak and realize the legendary moves, reshape the battlefield law!

▶ eight dynamic map hidden mystery: the mechanism of the eye of the formation / ancient martial arts monument / ancient relics randomly generated

▶ moment of choice: long-distance running encounter point may encounter siege, steady development or face the bottleneck of the war

▶ strategy game: buff stacking / weaponry rampage / breakthrough epiphany ... ... Every breakthrough affects the battlefield

In the last second, you are still complacent about controlling the BOSS, but in the next second, you may be swarmed by monsters; just now, you regret not choosing the life-saving skills, but the next corner is a breakthrough skill to turn the tide. Each reincarnation is a new chapter, hundreds of combinations of martial arts waiting for you to write the immortal legend of the warrior!

(Warm reminder: this work contains “sudden death” “darkness” “I'm really awesome” and so on a variety of complex martial arts experience, it is recommended to consume with tea to avoid too much excitement)

Our official qq group: 215699722
